problem id: 4e918d82
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11100001 -> 00001000
  00100010 -> 10011001
  01111000 -> 00100010
  10000001 -> 00100000
  01100010 -> 10101001
  01010000 -> 00111100
  11011110 -> 11011000
  11001101 -> 00010101
  01110010 -> 10100101

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 11101001
